name: golang-github-pkg-errors-dev
title: golang-github-pkg-errors-dev
summary: Simple error handling primitives for Go
description:
Simple error handling primitives for Go
Package errors provides simple error handling primitives for the Go
programming language.
.
The traditional error handling idiom in Go results in error reports without
context or debugging information.
.
The errors package allows programmers to add context to the failure path in
their code in a way that does not destroy the original value of the error.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-pkg-errors-dev because Simple error handling primitives for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-pkg-errors-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-pkg-errors-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-pkg-errors-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
